description: This  2026 Ford F-250 Platinum Crew Cab 4X4 includes a 5-inch BDS Stage 2 Radius Arm  w/Fox 2.5 Elite Series Remote Resi Front Rear Shocks and Four Wheel Alignment, 24-inch American Force Forged 'Provoke' Full Gloss Black Wheels, 37X13.50R24 Toyo Open Country R/T Trail Tires. Installed by our Certified  Tech: Richard! *Modifications are optional and are not included in the advertised price.* Take comfort and capability to fresh levels with our Diesel-powered 2026 Ford F-250 Platinum Crew Cab 4X4 in Avalanche! Motivated by a TurboCharged 6.7 Liter PowerStroke Diesel V8 supplying 475hp and 1050lb-ft of torque to a 10 Speed Automatic transmission for mighty strength. Features like a Pro Power Onboard generator, built-in payload/trailer-tongue scales, a power tailgate, power running boards, LED lighting, twin-panel power sunroof, a 5-inch BDS Stage 2 Radius Arm  w/Fox 2.5 Elite Series Remote Resi Front Rear Shocks and Four Wheel Alignment, 24-inch American Force Forged 'Provoke' Full Gloss Black Wheels, 37X13.50R24 Toyo Open Country R/T Trail Tires, and PowerScope mirrors help our Four Wheel Drive F-250 look good and work strong. Our Platinum cabin helps you stay comfortable with heated/ventilated leather power front and heated rear seats, a heated leather power steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, power-adjustable pedals, and a power sliding rear window. Digitally dominate the daily grind with a 12-inch touchscreen, a 12-inch productivity screen, connected navigation, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, wireless charging, WiFi compatibility, Bluetooth, voice control, and B O Unleashed audio by Bang Olufsen. For safer trucking, Ford delivers a head-up display, Pro Trailer backup/hitch assistance, front/rear automatic braking, trailer blind-spot monitoring, a 360-degree camera system, lane-keeping assistance, a tailgate-down camera, parking sensors, and more. Ready for a workout, our F-250 Platinum is a better way to go! Save this Page and Call for Availability. We Know You Will Enjoy Your Test Drive Towards Ownership!  Trucks has built an unmatched reputation over the last two decades for customizing and selling thousands of the highest quality used vehicles in the country. Our inventory is nationally sourced by our certified buyers who cherry pick only the best of the best of what is available. These vehicles then go through an 82 point inspection process to guarantee quality and safety. Our s are installed by our own factory-trained technicians, who have thousands of hours of experience. The installation is then inspected by a second dedicated quality control technician, before being sent to our state of the art Hunter Engineering laser alignment rack. Our aftermarket research and development team always matches the best fitting , shocks, and wheel tire combinations to each individual vehicle for optimal off-road performance, while maintaining an incredibly smooth ride on the street. We never cut any corners on our builds, which is why we only use top quality name brand products when building your Truck, SUV or Jeep.  Trucks has thousands of 5-star reviews, and one of the highest rates of repeat customers in the auto industry. description: This Lifted 2026 Ford F-250 Platinum Crew Cab 4X4 includes a 5-inch BDS Stage 2 Radius Arm Lift Kit w/Fox 2.5 Elite Series Remote Resi Front & Rear Shocks and Four Wheel Alignment, 24-inch American Force Forged "Notch" Full Gloss Black Wheels, 37X13.50R24 Nitto Ridge Grappler Tires. Motivated by a TurboCharged 6.7 Liter PowerStroke Diesel V8 supplying 475hp and 1050lb-ft of torque to a 10 Speed Automatic transmission for mighty strength. Features like a Pro Power Onboard generator, built-in payload/trailer-tongue scales, a power tailgate, power running boards, LED lighting, a 5-inch BDS Stage 2 Radius Arm Lift Kit w/Fox 2.5 Elite Series Remote Resi Front & Rear Shocks and Four Wheel Alignment, 24-inch American Force Forged "Notch" Full Gloss Black Wheels, 37X13.50R24 Nitto Ridge Grappler Tires, a power twin-panel sunroof, and PowerScope mirrors help our Four Wheel Drive F-250 look good and work strong.  Our Platinum cabin helps you stay comfortable with heated/ventilated leather power front and heated rear seats, a heated leather power steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, power-adjustable pedals, and a power sliding rear window. Digitally dominate the daily grind with a 12-inch touchscreen, a 12-inch productivity screen, connected navigation, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, wireless charging, WiFi compatibility, Bluetooth, voice control, and B&O Unleashed audio by Bang & Olufsen.  For safer trucking, Ford delivers a head-up display, Pro Trailer backup/hitch assistance, front/rear automatic braking, trailer blind-spot monitoring, a 360-degree camera system, lane-keeping assistance, a tailgate-down camera, parking sensors, and more. Ready for a workout, our F-250 Platinum is a better way to go! Save this Page and Call for Availability. We Know You Will Enjoy Your Test Drive Towards Ownership! Lifted Trucks has built an unmatched reputation over the last two decades for customizing and selling thousands of the highest quality used vehicles in the country. Our inventory is nationally sourced by our certified buyers who cherry pick only the best of the best of what is available. These vehicles then go through an 82 point inspection process to guarantee quality and safety. Our lift kits are installed by our own factory-trained technicians, who have thousands of hours of experience. The installation is then inspected by a second dedicated quality control technician, before being sent to our state of the art Hunter Engineering laser alignment rack. Our aftermarket research and development team always matches the best fitting lift kit, shocks, and wheel & tire combinations to each individual vehicle for optimal off-road performance, while maintaining an incredibly smooth ride on the street. We never cut any corners on our builds, which is why we only use top quality name brand products when building your Truck, SUV or Jeep. description: Elevate your driving experience with the exceptional 2026 Toyota Camry XSE. Beneath the hood, the Camry XSE is powered by a robust 2.5L 4-cylinder engine, delivering a responsive and efficient driving experience. Safety is a top priority in the Camry XSE, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Whether you're commuting to the office or embarking on a weekend getaway, the 2026 Toyota Camry XSE is the perfect companion. description: Get ready to leave the pavement far behind with the 2026 Nissan Frontier PRO-4X engineered for serious off-road adventure and built to thrive where the road ends. Take on rocks, sand, mud, and snow with confidence thanks to selectable terrain modes, optimizing traction and control for whatever the trail throws your way. When the elements turn cold, stay comfortable with heated leather front seats and a heated steering wheel, then open the sunroof to soak in the wide-open skies deep in the backcountry. Inside, advanced off-road-ready technology keeps you connected and in command with an intuitive touchscreen, navigation, smartphone integration, and driver-assist features. Crank up your trail soundtrack through the Fender premium 10-speaker sound system, delivering bold, immersive sound whether youre crawling over rocks or relaxing at camp. Haul your gear with confidence using the Utili-Track Channel System, keeping recovery equipment, bikes, and adventure essentials locked down no matter how rough the terrain gets. From rugged climbs to remote campsites, the 2026 Nissan Frontier PRO-4X is built to conquer more ground, explore deeper, and turn every off-road journey into an unforgettable adventure.  4WD, 120V Power Outlet in Bed, 120V Power Outlet in Rear Center Console, 4-Wheel Disc Brakes, ABS brakes, Air Conditioning, Anti-whiplash front head restraints, Auto High-beam Headlights, Auto-Dimming Mirror, Auto-Tilt & Slide Sunroof w/Manual Shade, Automatic temperature control, Bed Under-Rail Lighting, Blind Spot Warning, Brake assist, Delay-off headlights, Driver door bin, Dual front impact airbags, Dual front side impact airbags, Electronic Stability Control, Emergency communication system, Fender Premium Audio System w/10 Speakers, Front anti-roll bar, Front dual zone A/C, Front fog lights, Front wheel independent suspension, Fully automatic headlights, Heated Front Seats, Heated Outside Mirrors, Heated Steering Wheel, Heated steering wheel, HomeLink UGDO, Intelligent Around View Monitor (I-AVM), Knee airbag, Leather Seat Trim, Leather Shift Knob, Leather steering wheel, Low tire pressure warning, Mud Flaps, Nissan Door-to-Door Navigation, Occupant sensing airbag, Off-Road Style Step Rails, Overhead airbag, Panic alarm, Partial Under-Seat Storage Delete, Passenger door bin, Power door mirrors, PRO Premium Package, PRO-4X Convenience Package, PRO-4X R (Roush) Package, Radio: SXM/AM/FM/AUX/USB Audio System, Rear anti-roll bar, Rear side impact airbag, Rear step bumper, Remote Engine Starter, Remote keyless entry, Security system, Speed control, Speed-sensing steering, Spray-In Bedliner, Steering wheel mounted audio controls, Tow Package (T11), Traction control, Traffic Sign Recognition (TSR), Trailer Hitch w/Wiring Harness, Unique Color for Grille Inserts & Skid Plate, Utili-Track System, Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wireless Android Auto, Wireless Charging for Personal Devices. description: 2024 Tesla Model Y Performance  All-Electric Power, Precision, and Luxury in White  Experience cutting-edge performance and advanced technology in this 2024 Tesla Model Y Performance, finished in a clean White exterior with a striking White/Black interior. With instant electric acceleration, sleek design, and a spacious cabin, the Model Y Performance delivers a premium driving experience with zero emissions.  Powered by dual electric motors and an advanced All-Wheel Drive (AWD) system, this Model Y Performance delivers exhilarating acceleration, razor-sharp handling, and confident traction in all conditions. As an all-electric SUV, it offers impressive efficiency with an EPA-estimated 115 MPGe city / 106 MPGe highway, making it both powerful and cost-effective to own.  Inside, the minimalist and modern cabin features premium seating, a panoramic glass roof, heated seats, wireless charging, and Teslas signature 15-inch touchscreen that controls navigation, media, climate, and vehicle settings. With ample cargo space and a versatile rear layout, the Model Y is just as practical as it is fast.  Advanced safety and driver assistance features include Tesla Autopilot, forward collision warning, automatic emergency braking, lane-keeping assistance, blind-spot monitoring, a rearview camera, and multiple airbagsdesigned to keep you protected on every drive.  At National City Auto Center, we are proud to be San Diegos #1 Independent Dealership and a CARFAX Certified Dealer, offering quality pre-owned vehicles with verified history. With over 350 units available, we make it easy to find the perfect electric vehicle to fit your lifestyle.  Come experience the performance and innovation of this 2024 Tesla Model Y Performance today and see why it continues to set the standard for electric SUVs. description: Ferrari Silicon Valley is proud to offer this beautifully specified Pre-Owned 2025 Ferrari 296 GTB. Finished in the distinguished Verde British Racing over a rich Cuoio leather interior, and showing just 950 miles, this example stands out with its bespoke touches, race-inspired technology, and unmistakable Ferrari performance.  The sleek lines of the 296 GTB are enhanced by purposeful elements such as titanium wheel studs and sports tailpipe tips, highlighting its aggressive stance. A unique color pairing, combined with meticulous details like the matte finish for interior carbon fiber, sets this car apart as a true collector-grade modern Ferrari.     The cabin showcases Ferraris driver-focused layout, trimmed in elegant Cuoio leather and outfitted with performance and luxury in equal measure. The carbon fiber steering wheel with LEDs provides shift lights and integrated controls, while the carbon fiber center tunnel and Daytona racing seats in carbon fiber reflect a commitment to lightweight construction and race-ready design. Apple CarPlay keeps connectivity seamless for modern driving needs.    Engine and Performance: The 296 GTB is powered by Ferraris groundbreaking 3.0 liter twin turbocharged V6 paired with an electric motor, delivering a combined 819 horsepower and 546 lb ft of torque. An 8 speed dual clutch transmission sends power to the rear wheels, propelling the car from 0 to 60 mph in just 2.9 seconds. Agile, balanced, and blisteringly quick, the 296 GTB delivers an unforgettable blend of hybrid innovation and traditional Ferrari emotion.     Key Features:     Carbon Fiber Center Tunnel:  A lightweight and stylish element that enhances the performance-focused cockpit.    Carbon Fiber Steering Wheel with LEDs:  Race-inspired design with integrated shift lights and driver controls.    Titanium Wheel Studs:  Reduce unsprung weight and add a subtle performance-oriented touch.    Daytona Racing Seats in Carbon Fiber:  Deliver superb support and aesthetic appeal with Ferraris iconic Daytona pattern.    Apple CarPlay:  Seamless smartphone integration for media, navigation, and communication.    Sports Tailpipe Tips:  Provide a sportier exhaust note and enhance the cars aggressive styling.    Matte Finish for Interior Carbon Fiber:  Offers a refined, motorsport-inspired look with reduced glare and a premium feel.    This 2025 Ferrari 296 GTB is far more than just a car; it is the embodiment of the brand's commitment to peak automotive engineering and opulent design. Available at Ferrari Silicon Valley, this vehicle offers an invitation to experience the thrill of a luxury sports car that pushes the boundaries of excitement and elegance.         Ferrari Silicon Valley is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. Our dealership features a beautiful Ferrari showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and Ferrari accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email, or drop by our location at  2750 El Camino Real, Redwood City, CA 94061.We invite you to Activate Your Ownership with us today![!@@Additional Info@@!]Navigation System,6 Speakers,AM/FM radio,Radio data system,Radio: Audio & Nav Systems in Digital Gauge Cluster,Air Conditioning,Automatic temperature control,Rear window defroster,Power driver seat,Power steering,Power windows,Remote keyless entry,Steering wheel mounted audio controls,Adaptive suspension,Four wheel independent suspension,Speed-sensing steering,Traction control,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,ABS brakes,Ceramic disc brakes: front and rear,Dual front impact airbags,Dual front side impact airbags,Front anti-roll bar,Low tire pressure warning,Passenger cancellable airbag,Rear anti-roll bar,Brake assist,Electronic Stability Control,Exterior Parking Camera Rear,Rear Parking Sensors,Delay-off headlights,Fully automatic headlights,Rear fog lights,Security system,Speed control,Bumpers: body-color,Heated door mirrors,Power door mirrors,Spoiler,Apple CarPlay,Compass,Driver door bin,Front reading lights,Illuminated entry,Leather steering wheel,Outside temperature display,Sport steering wheel,Standard Seats,Tachometer,Telescoping steering wheel,Tilt steering wheel,Trip computer,Voltmeter,Front Bucket Seats,Front Center Armrest,Leather Seat Trim,Power passenger seat,Passenger door bin,Alloy wheels,Wheels: 20" Standard,Rain sensing wipers,Variably intermittent wipers
